title: Nano Flow Manifest
description: Shared contract between Storyboard AI (planner) and AutoFlow Reel extension (operator). Identical copy lives in both repos under docs/nano-flow-pipeline/. See DESIGN.md.

social_posts.description: Reuses the existing Storyboard SocialPosts shape verbatim (tiktok / youtube_shorts / facebook_reel).

assets.description: Reference images declared once per project. Each shot references entries by id. image=null means the slot is declared but the user attaches the real image on the extension side.

id.description: Stable id referenced by shots, e.g. char_lan

image.description: data: URI or null (user attaches later in extension)

refSelector.description: Which declared assets to attach at a given step.

use_generated_storyboard.description: Use the Nano-Banana-generated image from step A as the video FIRST FRAME.

environments.description: Default empty — background already baked into the keyframe (see DESIGN.md §6).

products.description: Default empty — enable only when exact logo/label fidelity is needed.

storyboard_name.description: Name given to the Nano Banana image, ordered.

storyboard_prompt.description: STEP A — prompt (written 100% by Storyboard) to generate the storyboard/keyframe image with Nano Banana.

image_refs.description: STEP A — which assets feed the image generation.

video_prompt.description: STEP B — full Veo prompt (written 100% by Storyboard).

characters_in_scene.description: Exact character names on screen (mirrors Storyboard VideoSegment.characters_in_scene).

video_refs.description: STEP B — which refs to attach when generating the video.

voice.description: Maps to the extension voice list (auto/achernar/achird/...).
